title: About
text:
About Case Management NI
Case Management NI provides independent case management and rehabilitation coordination across Northern Ireland.
Our approach is professional, calm, practical, and human-centred.

We focus on what matters most to the person: independence, safety, confidence, family life, and meaningful progress.

title: Case Management NI
text:
Professional, person-centred case management services across Northern Ireland.
We support people following serious injury, illness, or life-changing events, helping them access the right rehabilitation, care, and practical support.
Contact Us




We help coordinate therapy, care, equipment, community services, and ongoing support.



We work with clients, families, solicitors, insurers, and healthcare professionals to keep plans clear, joined-up, and realistic.



Every plan is shaped around the person, their goals, their family, and their everyday life.




Clear communication, practical planning, and compassionate support are at the centre of everything we do.

title: Contact
text:
Contact
For referrals, professional enquiries, or general questions, please get in touch.

Please do not send confidential personal or medical information by email unless this has been agreed in advance.

title: Resources
text:
Resources
This page will include useful guidance for clients, families, and professionals.

Coming Soon
Guides, referral information, useful links, and downloadable resources will be added here.

title: Services
text:
Services
We provide practical, coordinated support for people with complex needs.

Initial Needs Assessment
A clear assessment of current needs, priorities, risks, and support requirements.


Rehabilitation Planning
Coordinating therapy, equipment, care, and community-based support.


Ongoing Case Management
Regular review, liaison, planning, and progress monitoring.


Professional Liaison
Working with solicitors, insurers, therapists, GPs, consultants, and care providers.

title: Services
text: Support for clients recovering from serious injury or complex conditions.

title: Services
text: Coordinating care, rehabilitation, and community services.

title: Services
text: Working alongside legal and healthcare professionals.

title: Services
text: Helping families navigate complex care pathways.
